_description: Canonical agent metadata — hooks read from here instead of hardcoding names
_schema_version_notes: v6 (AOC v1.2): adds `lead-orchestrated` (pass-able via pass_lead_orchestrated) and `lead-skipped` (audit-only, no predicate) provenance values; adds `lead_orchestrated_forbidden` registry field excluding security-attacker/security-defender (probes touch live endpoints; retrospective lead attestation unsound); extends security-fixer/quality-fixer `allowed_verdicts`/`allowed_results` to include `skipped`; adds `_aggregate_ok_accepted_predicates` structured field (single source of truth for the aggregate_ok sibling-acceptance set; F8 lint asserts AST equality with the predicate impl). v5 (AOC v1.1 PR4): adds resolve-reviewer as a first-class verdict_agent (closes #1055 alias drift). v4 (AOC v1.1): extends provenance enum to 7 values (lead-on-behalf, lead-synthesized, lead-fix); adds pass_lead_on_behalf / pass_lead_fix / pass_lead_synthesized predicates; validated_fallback now accepts lead-on-behalf with recovery_validated:true; aggregate_ok sibling acceptance includes new predicates. See agent-output-contract.md "Versioning rules" for the synchronized-update protocol. v3 (AOC v1): adds verdict_agents_schema declaring per-agent allowed_verdicts/allowed_results/required_structured_fields. hard_gates add pass_clean/pass_after_fixes predicates alongside v2 predicates. v2: adds non_fixer_agents, recovery_forbidden, lead_merge_aggregate_agents; hard_gates use structured predicates. See .claude/patterns/agent-trace-protocol.md.
_verdict_agents_schema_docs: AOC v1 per-agent vocabulary. Each entry declares the allowed verdict values (AVS v1 core: pass/fail/blocked/unresolved) and allowed result qualifiers (clean/fixed/partial/degraded/skipped/none/count_summary/null). count_summary agents MUST emit required_structured_fields; gates key on those fields via additional_block_conditions in hard_gates[]. R1 coherence rule enforces that evaluate-hard-gate-predicates.py predicates and agent .md files stay consistent with this table.

landing-sections-critic._split_from_note: #1468 landing-critic split: sibling of landing-images-critic. Layer 1/2/3 section scoring scope only. Pre-aggregated by .claude/scripts/merge-landing-critic-traces.py into design-critic-landing.json before the outer merge-design-critic-traces.py runs. Same verdict/result vocab as design-critic.

landing-images-critic._split_from_note: #1468 landing-critic split: sibling of landing-sections-critic. Step 5.5 image candidate inspection + image-quality anti-patterns + image fixes scope only. Pre-aggregated into design-critic-landing.json. Same verdict/result vocab as design-critic.

ux-journeyer._fixes_applied_note: #1379 G2: fixes_applied is an int COUNT (not a list[dict]). The file list goes in `fixes[]`. Schema drift bug: agents/ux-journeyer.md documents the field as a count, but verify-design-critic-post-fix-respawn.py used to iterate it expecting list[dict] and crashed with 'int' object is not iterable. Iteration removed; field role pinned here for downstream consumers.

security-fixer._tests_need_update_note: #1450 gap 9: list[dict] of {file, line, old_code, new_code, reason}. Emitted unconditionally; empty list [] when no test assertions were invalidated by the applied fixes. Surfaces stale colocated-test assertions after OWASP A4 fixes (e.g., status-code collapse 404/409 → 400) so the lead can dispatch a test-reconciler or escalate to user instead of manually rewriting assertions. Consumer: /verify or /change Phase X.
security-fixer._skipped_note: AOC v1.2: verdict=blocked + result=skipped is the audit-only sanctioned-skip shape written by write-skipped-fixer-trace.sh when the upstream gate fired. AVS v1 closes verdict to {pass,fail,blocked,unresolved}, so we use 'blocked' (semantically: 'fixer was blocked from spawning by upstream') with result='skipped' as the qualifier. No pass_* predicate accepts verdict=blocked, so the hard gate blocks naturally; the trace exists solely so observer + audit consumers see the decision. Note: ux-journeyer ALREADY uses verdict=blocked as an additional_block_condition — precedent exists for this verdict value.

_rmg_v2_concern_schema._doc: RMG v2 Phase D — each entry in concerns[] must carry concern_id (12-char sha1 of category|canonicalized-description) and category (enum). prior_failure_dossier_evaluated is now strict-required at the trace top level (empty list when no dossier was passed). Tightened in the post-cutover follow-up after first-principles risk analysis confirmed required_structured_fields is documentation/contract — runtime traces are not retroactively validated against it.

_lead_orchestrated_forbidden_docs: AOC v1.2: agents whose verdicts are NOT eligible for retrospective lead-orchestrated re-spawn even though they are non-fixers. security-* probes touch live endpoints whose original failure conditions (server state, rate-limits, token freshness) may not be reproducible at retrospective time; lead-attesting `pass` against a snapshot the system cannot independently re-verify is unsound. F7 lint enforces: agents in this list MUST NOT have `pass_lead_orchestrated` in their hard_gates allow_predicates.

traces.missing_error: design-critic.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
ux-journeyer.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
security-defender.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
security-attacker.json trace not found — cannot validate merge
solve-critic.json trace not found -- cannot validate change challenge (solve_depth=full)

_hard_gates_docs: Rules block verify-report-gate from allowing hard_gate_failure:false when ANY of them fires. v2 gates use structured predicates (see _hard_gates_predicate_docs) that make recovery an audit marker validated by evidence, not a blanket fail trigger.

_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_clean: AOC v1: verdict == pass AND result == clean AND provenance == self. Agent found nothing to do (no work performed).
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_after_fixes: AOC v1: verdict == pass AND result in {fixed, partial} AND provenance == self AND unresolved_critical == 0. Agent found issues and resolved all non-critical; criticals are zero.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_self_pass_or_fail: verdict in {pass,fail} AND provenance == self. For agents where a recorded fail is acceptable as long as it was self-reported.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_self_strict: verdict == pass AND provenance == self. For agents where anything but a clean self-reported pass requires investigation.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.validated_fallback: AOC v1.1: provenance in {recovery, self-degraded, lead-on-behalf} AND recovery_validated == true. Acceptable replacement for pass_self_* when independent evidence confirms the verdict. AOC v1: accepts #1042 fixture short-circuit self-degraded traces. AOC v1.1: lead-on-behalf permits the case where the agent succeeded but its trace write was blocked and the lead transcribed; same evidence discipline (build + e2e + diff-fix) applies.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.aggregate_ok: provenance == lead-merge AND contributing_spawn_indexes present AND each contributing sibling trace satisfies any pass-class predicate. The authoritative enumeration of accepted sibling predicates lives in `_aggregate_ok_accepted_predicates` below — DO NOT consult this prose for the predicate set; F8 lint asserts AST equality between that structured array and the impl in evaluate-hard-gate-predicates.py. Prose retained only as human-readable summary.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.legacy_pass_no_recovery: verdict == pass AND recovery != true. Backward-compat predicate for traces missing provenance (pre-migration). Drops after legacy migration completes.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_lead_on_behalf: AOC v1.1: verdict == pass AND provenance == lead-on-behalf AND recovery_validated == true. Distinct opt-in for agents whose hard_gate explicitly accepts lead-transcribed traces beyond what validated_fallback covers; usually unnecessary because validated_fallback already accepts lead-on-behalf.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_lead_fix: AOC v1.1: verdict == pass AND provenance == lead-fix AND lead_attestation == true. Lead applied an in-flight fix without spawning a subagent; lead has direct knowledge so no recovery_validated required. Used by virtual lead-<skill> agents when registered in hard_gates.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_lead_synthesized: AOC v1.1: verdict == pass AND provenance == lead-synthesized AND coverage_provider != null. Agent was never spawned; lead wrote a consistency marker pointing to the artifact that satisfies coverage. Used by virtual lead-<skill> agents when registered in hard_gates.
_hard_gates_predicate_docs.pass_lead_orchestrated: AOC v1.2: verdict == pass AND provenance == lead-orchestrated AND lead_attestation == true AND source_run_id AND source_skill. Lead orchestrated a retrospective re-spawn under post-completion conditions (all .runs/*-context.json had completed:true, so resolve_active_identity returned empty). Explicit identity supplied via --source-run-id / --source-skill flags; spawn-log presence enforced upstream by the writer's R3 validation. Same evidence discipline as pass_lead_fix (lead has direct knowledge). Forbidden for agents in `recovery_forbidden` (high-risk fixers) AND in `lead_orchestrated_forbidden` (security-* probes whose live-endpoint state may be irreproducible).

_aggregate_ok_accepted_predicates_docs: AOC v1.2: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the predicate set that aggregate_ok accepts as sibling-pass shapes. F8 lint (aggregate_ok_predicate_doc_matches_impl) parses evaluate-hard-gate-predicates.py via AST and asserts the predicate-name set called inside the aggregate_ok `or` chain equals this array exactly. Adding/removing here REQUIRES the matching impl edit in the same PR — drift is blocked.

hard_gates._block_explanation: Blocked unless AOC v1 pass_clean/pass_after_fixes, or v2 pass_self_pass_or_fail / validated_fallback (also covers #1042 fixture short-circuit via self-degraded + recovery_validated) / aggregate_ok, or legacy_pass_no_recovery (pre-migration), or pass_lead_synthesized (#1256 Stage 0 all-pages-fast-path lead-synthesized aggregate with sanctioned coverage_provider), or AOC v1.2 pass_lead_orchestrated (post-completion lead-orchestrated re-spawn with explicit-identity attestation).

Parity with design-critic per design-agents-hard-gate-parity coherence rule. #1468 landing split: this sibling of landing-images-critic owns Layer 1/2/3 section scoring; same allow_predicates set so the pre-merged design-critic-landing.json sibling is accepted via aggregate_ok at the outer design-critic merge.

Parity with design-critic per design-agents-hard-gate-parity coherence rule. #1468 landing split: this sibling of landing-sections-critic owns Step 5.5 image candidate inspection; same allow_predicates set.

additional_block_conditions._legacy_note: Pre-AOC-v1 partial-as-verdict shape; retained until legacy traces migrated.

hard_gates._note: security-fixer is in recovery_forbidden — recovery provenance is refused by write-recovery-trace.sh. Only self / self-degraded / lead-merge paths are reachable. AOC v1: fail+partial with unresolved_critical>0 is the blocking shape; pass+partial with criticals=0 passes via pass_after_fixes.

additional_block_conditions._legacy_note: Pre-AOC-v1 partial-as-verdict shape; retained until legacy traces migrated.

hard_gates._note: quality-fixer is in recovery_forbidden — see security-fixer note.

AOC v1.1 PR4 (closes #1055): resolve-reviewer is read-mostly (no fixes), so allow_predicates excludes pass_after_fixes (no fix application) and aggregate_ok (single-trace, no per-issue siblings). Sibling of resolve-challenger but with implementation-review vectors (completeness/correctness/consistency). AOC v1.2: pass_lead_orchestrated added per F7 derivation (verdict_agent, not in recovery_forbidden, not in lead_orchestrated_forbidden).

#1275 / Group A: observer is canonical /observe re-spawn target. Hard_gate exists primarily to license post-completion lead-orchestrated re-spawns (SOURCE_RUN_ID/SOURCE_SKILL honoring path) — observer is observation-only and never blocks delivery in normal flow. No additional_block_conditions because audit agents do not ship code.
#1275 / Group A: pattern-classifier is canonical /observe and /retro re-spawn target. See observer note for rationale.

#1275 / Group A: design-consistency-checker may be lead-orchestrated re-spawned after a shared-component fix lands (state-3a Stage 1b → state-3c flow). #1257: aggregate_ok added so the page-batched lead-merge aggregate (provenance=lead-merge + contributing_spawn_indexes) is accepted by the gate. #1381 D1: pass_lead_synthesized added for parity with design-critic — state-3a Stage 0 all-pages-fast-path writes a lead-synthesized aggregate for BOTH design agents; design-critic accepts it via this predicate, design-consistency-checker must too.

#1387: post-fan-out behavior-contract audit. Same lifecycle position as design-critic / design-consistency-checker (consumes scaffold-pages output, produces verdict for state-11c VERIFY). Executor is lead-orchestrated Python (.claude/scripts/lib/behavior_contract_auditor.py), not a spawned subagent — the verdict artifact .runs/behavior-implementation-audit.json is consumed by .claude/scripts/verify-state-11c-behavior-audit.py at state-registry:bootstrap.11c. allow_predicates superset of design-critic via design-agents-hard-gate-parity linter rule (template-coherence-rules.json design-agents-hard-gate-parity).

_legacy_hard_gates_v1: The v1 block_rules form is preserved below only for reference during migration. Do not read from it — verify-report-gate.sh reads hard_gates (v2) above.
